title: Managing Agile Open-Source Software Projects with Visual Studio Online
description: ALM Rangers share best practices for managing requirements and shipping solutions in agile open-source projects using Visual Studio Online.
overview: This book describes the best practices, principles, and patterns that enable you to create flexible, adaptive code and deliver better business value. Written by the ALM Rangers, it focuses on agile programming and covers the full lifecycle from triaging ideas through getting ready, building working solutions, and raising the quality bar.
